actors.text: Claim: support rates differ between city A and city B. Pick the correct hypotheses.

actors.reflection: H0 always contains the equality (the 'no difference' case). Ha carries the strict inequality. You've swapped them.

actors.text: H0: p1 = p2; Ha: p1 > p2
actors.reflection: The claim says rates 'differ' (no direction). That's a TWO-sided test with !=, not a one-sided > test.

completion.rule: any correct QuestionDoor switch pressed by >= 1/3 of online players, then any Player walks onto Goal
